description_long: This is a retro-styled microwave oven with a smooth, pastel blue exterior and rounded edges, giving it a vintage appearance. The front features a large, oval-shaped black window set into the door, above which the word 'Retrowave' is prominently displayed in a stylized script. To the right of the window, there is a circular digital clock display showing the time, surrounded by a green-lit ring, and below it are two rotary dials and a button for controlling the microwave's functions. The body is boxy and seamless, with no visible seams or handles except for a red button labeled 'NOTAUS' beneath the window, likely serving as an emergency stop or door release. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents or additional features, and the top is flat and unadorned. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A pastel blue, retro-style microwave with a large oval window, digital clock, and rotary controls on the front, featuring smooth, rounded edges and a decorative 'Retrowave' label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval window, 'Retrowave' label, digital clock, rotary dials, and red button.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth blue surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat blue panel with no visible vents or markings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain blue surface, only the edge of the control panel slightly visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Retrowave' is displayed in a large, stylized black script on the upper front of the door, serving as a decorative brand label.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face and features a circular digital clock display at the top, surrounded by a green-lit ring. Below the display are two rotary dials and a single button, all arranged vertically. The dials and button are labeled with simple markings, and the panel is compact and integrated into the main body.
attribute_door_handle_design: There is no traditional protruding handle; instead, a red rectangular button labeled 'NOTAUS' is centered below the window, likely functioning as a door release or emergency stop. The door itself is flush with the body, maintaining a sleek appearance.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any side of the microwave, suggesting a concealed or rear-vented design.
attribute_window_presence: A large, oval-shaped black window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
